headline: Jim Cramer Says “For Sysco, the Jetro Acquisition’s Superb”
summary: Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY) is among the stocks in focus as Jim Cramer highlighted a market yearning for the status quo ante. Cramer highlighted the company’s Jetro deal, as he stated: Or how about yesterday, when Sysco… the very reliable food service distributor. They bought Jetro, this terrific wholesale supplier where you can pick up just […]
